deploy.preDeployCommand: python manage.py migrate && python -c "import os, django; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'config.settings'); django.setup(); from django.contrib.auth.models import User; User.objects.filter(username='admin').exists() or User.objects.create_superuser('admin', 'admin@microfinance.local', 'admin123'); print('✅ Database initialized')"
